replies.msg: My friend Joe is 30 years old while his girlfriend is 37. Joe isn't very well-to-do while his girlfriend's family is very well-off. Last Sunday he gave a house party where cheap wines were served. The sofas in his apartment are made of some cheap material. His television is cheap and nasty. Some of us wanted to watch the news so I said "If I could turn the television on please" Joe then said "Sure. If you would switch to the news channel" Recently Joe got some new clothes on the cheap from a shop facing possible liquidation. He bought a pair of cheap shoes that fell apart after a couple months so I bought him a pair of good quality shoes. He's too cheap to buy new shoes. He's very mean with the air conditioner too- it's only on for an hour each day then he turns the fans on and opens the windows instead but the air conditioner was dirt cheap. Last month he vacationed in Macau but he's so cheap he didn't even buy us postcards. He stayed at a three star hotel where it serves cheap and cheerful food and sells cheap and cheerful clothes. He's a flutist. He explained to us regarding a piece by Ravel "This passage should be played beautifully rather than rhythmically. Otherwise it's a bit cheap" I saw lots of his pencil writings on the score such as: cantabile, silence, no pause here, just separate, clean pedal, more melodic voicing, remain soft, stay soft, quiet, hear tenor, clearer, articulate, in time, silvery soft, gentler, take time....Regarding teaching he said "I prefer payment in blocks. My students pay monthly or for four lessons at a time. For this month it's ok to pay on a lesson-by-lesson basis since maybe you wanna see what it's like to have lessons. From next month onwards you can pay monthly. Students of all standards are welcome. I'm also an accompanist who accompanies instrumentalists, singers and other performers for exams, auditions and live performances." He asked me to get him some Rachmaninoff scores as I can get them on the cheap from a friend of mine. He's a boxing fan. We watched a boxing fight in which Paul hit Chris with a cheap shot after he lost to Chris. We watched a comedy show as well which was full of cheap laughs. The comedian is famous for his vulgar manner and wearing a vulgar suit. His grandfather was a cheap liar and gangster. His jokes and jibes were cheap and vulgar. By the way say the following to your girlfriend: You're gorgeous, cute and pretty. You're the best thing that has ever happened to me. Your love is what keeps me going every day. It's awesome to spend my life with you. I'm looking forward to spending the rest of our lives together. Last night I sent an angel to look over you while you slept. The angel returned to me and when I asked why? The angel said that angels don't watch over angels. This afternoon I went to the hospital and got an x-ray, do you know what they found? You in my heart. The doctor said that my heart will always be fine with you in it. Last summer my friend Simon married Chloe, his girlfriend from Tinder. They were married by a pastor in Rosewood hotel. I said "Wishing you a lifetime of love and happiness" My elder brother wrote "Best wishes on this wonderful journey as you build your new lives together" My younger brother wrote "Thank you for letting us share in this joyful day. We wish you all the best as you embark on this wonderful union!" My sister wrote "Congratulations on finding each other. Your greatest adventure has just begun!" My cousin wrote "Wishing you fulfilment of every dream!" Do you believe in horoscope? What zodiac sign are you? To me the personality description at times seems correct but I don't believe in the foretelling. I'm a Virgo. Tell me about the disposition and personality traits typical of a virgo. I wanna see if they're accurate. Are you into meditation as well? Today many people practise zen meditation in pursuit of tranquility and happiness.

replies.msg: 因為個陣 training一開始要我哋主動識3個其他枱嘅人，我份人又怕醜，但係佢都主動搵我，聊我傾。放飯原本諗住自己食，因為我份人又獨來獨往，佢又係後面落泥叫我同佢哋食。食飯個陣都有講下好多自己野，佢知我細佢4年就之後叫弟弟，活動緊或者行過都弟弟，不過個陣我同另外一齊兩個食飯(1男1女)嘅都叫佢姐姐，我都係叫佢英文名
